rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it “extends … Ho and Chong (2003)” by building analytical mappings from aggregate attribute-level share models to SKU-level parameters, indicating direct methodological dependence rather than a passing mention. The cited paper is a core parsimonious SKU-choice model in this line of work, and the citing paper’s stated research gap is framed against prior household-panel attribute/SKU modeling like this one.
